top_signals.title: Bonds Rally Ahead of Fed as Oil Extends Slide: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Bonds climbed as oil headed for its longest losing streak in 10 months, with investors awaiting the Federal Reserve’s policy decision for clues on the outlook for global interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: We have to manage the AI revolution
top_signals.summary: There must be a global agreement on how the technology is controlled
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Huawei’s big comeback tests limits of US chip controls
top_signals.summary: Seven years after being written off the Chinese tech giant is making technical advances that appear to sidestep Washington curbs
